summary: The diff implements fixes across WebcamFeed, useHandTracking, useAudioPlayer, gestureRecognition, GesturePiano, PianoKeyboard, and VolumeControl. All four requirements are at least partially addressed. REQ-1 is covered by the refactored WebcamFeed and useHandTracking hook with proper MediaPipe CDN loading, canvas drawing, and gesture propagation. REQ-2 is addressed by useAudioPlayer using pure oscillator-based synthesis with ADSR envelopes. REQ-3 is addressed by gestureRecognition.ts with 25-note mapping and finger extension thresholds. REQ-4 is addressed by GesturePiano's responsive grid layout with all three sub-sections. However, several specific acceptance criteria have concerns around sample loading fallback behavior and continuous note firing when hand is at rest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Piano sample files load successfully for the full C4-C6 range (25 keys); if sample files fail to load, the fallback oscillator synthesis must activate automatically.
missing_requirements.reason: The useAudioPlayer implementation never attempts to load piano sample files at all. isLoading and loadError states are hardcoded to false/null, indicating no sample loading logic exists. The AC implies a primary sample-loading path with automatic fallback, which is absent.

missing_requirements.requirement: No notes fire continuously when the hand is at rest; each of the 25 notes can be triggered by a distinct, reachable hand gesture.
missing_requirements.reason: The debounce is purely time-based (80ms). If the hand remains stationary with 2+ fingers extended, the debounce expires and the same note re-fires indefinitely. There are no distinct gestures per note; all 25 notes are mapped solely by wrist X position in a continuous sweep.

hallucinated_features.description: FPS counter displayed in the WebcamFeed UI using a requestAnimationFrame loop.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention an FPS counter or any performance display widget. This is an unrequested extra UI element.

hallucinated_features.description: Mute/unmute toggle button on the VolumeControl component that toggles volume between 0 and 0.7 when the volume icon is clicked.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires a volume slider that adjusts playback volume in real time. A dedicated mute toggle button was not requested.
